name: Granola
summary: Pull meeting notes + transcripts into 1-inbox/transcripts/ — our own connector (calls the Granola public API directly; does not use the Granola MCP).

docs.instructions: In the Granola desktop app: Settings → Connectors → API keys → Create new key → tick the 'Personal notes' scope (add 'Public notes' for team/workspace notes) → Generate API Key. Requires a Business or Enterprise plan.
